creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
wait, let me get this straight.

The port doesn't yet exist, yet there's a PR to correct the shar before it's committed?

This is silly.

Please update the shar to take into account bug Bug 194139 so we can close Bug 194139.  Also, don't forget to get rid of @dirrm.  redports is worthless for QA until further notice.
